column1: Satellite Footage Reveals Entire Lebanese Villages Flattened as Israel Accused of Using Gaza-Style Tactics
column3:
NO HOME LEFT STANDING: SATELLITE FOOTAGE EXPOSES THE TOTAL ERASURE OF LEBANESE VILLAGES. 🇱🇧💔

Towns like Khiam, which survived decades of conflict, are being wiped off the map by bulldozers and explosives in what locals call an attempt to erase the town’s identity.

The same heavy equipment used to shred Gaza into pieces has been moved to Lebanon to finish the job. Over 50,000 homes have already been hit. 

STOP ERASING OUR VILLAGES! ENOUGH. 

Source: @eye.on.palestine 

#LebanonUnderAttack #GazaPlaybook #WarCrimes #BintJbeil #fyp

column1: West Bank Erupts: Israeli Forces Detain Palestinians as Settlers Burn Homes with Families Inside
column3:
NO RESPITE FOR PALESTINE!!

Yesterday saw a horrifying escalation of state-sanctioned terror as the occupied West Bank was hit with a level of violence that has already shattered records for 2026. We are seeing a coordinated campaign where Israeli forces blindfold and detain Palestinian men, while extremist settlers, acting with total impunity, rampage through villages, burning homes and vehicles with residents still trapped inside.

The details from the last 24 hours are sickening: In coordinated overnight attacks, dozens of settlers torched family homes near Nablus and Ramallah, surrounding the structures to prevent anyone from escaping the flames. We are hearing reports of children and infants suffering from smoke inhalation while their parents are held at gunpoint by soldiers who are supposed to maintain order.

And where is the “most moral army in the world”? Standing by and watching. Or worse, detaining the victims while their property turns to ash.

The people of the West Bank have NO RESPITE while these war crimes are funded and ignored.

SHAME ON THE SILENT!

Source: @aljazeeraenglish 

#WestBankRampage #SettlerViolence #SavePalestine #WarCrimes #fypaNO RESPITE FOR PALESTINE!!

column1: Canada Backs Down, Grants Visas to Palestine Football Team After Mounting Pressure
column3:
GREAT UPDATE! Canada Grants Visas After Initial Denial Sparks Backlash

A week after facing criticism for denying visas to officials from the Palestinian Football Association, Canada has reversed its decision and granted the necessary entry permits.

The initial denial drew concern from advocates and observers, who viewed the move as a restriction on Palestinian representation in international forums. Some critics have alleged that political pressure, including from pro-Israel lobbying groups, may have influenced the initial decision. 

The incident has fueled broader debate over access, representation, and the treatment of Palestinian voices on the global stage.

Swipe to read our statement.

Source: @pymmontreal 

THIS IS WHY WE SHOULD USE OUR PLATFORM WISELY. 
YOUR VOICE MATTERS! 

KEEP SPEAKING, KEEP SHARING STORIES ABOUT THE INJUSTICES. 
Together we can move mountains🇵🇸💪🏼

column1: Unprecedented: Trump Fires All 24 Members of National Science Board for First Time in 75 Years
column3:
TRUMP JUST WIPED OUT THE ENTIRE NATIONAL SCIENCE BOARD—75 YEARS OF PRECEDENT GONE IN A SECOND.

In a move described by experts as without precedent in 75 years, the Trump administration has fired all 24 members of the National Science Board (NSB). This independent body, created by Congress in 1950, is responsible for overseeing the nearly $9 billion budget of the National Science Foundation and ensuring that federal science funding remains insulated from political interference.

This isn’t just about one name.
It’s about a system where independent truth is being replaced by political loyalty. They want to muzzle the experts so they can redistribute billions in research funds without anyone to say no. They aren’t just firing scientists; they are deleting the oversight that keeps the public in the picture.

SHARE THIS to expose the war on science!

Courtesy of @thejenniwren 

#Trump #NationalScienceBoard #SciencePurge #WarOnTruth #america
